name: arxiv_search
description: Search ArXiv for academic papers. Returns paper titles, authors, abstracts, and PDF links. Useful for finding research papers on scientific and technical topics.

query.description: Search query for finding papers (e.g., 'large language models', 'reinforcement learning')

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 10, max 50)

sort_by.description: Sort order: 'relevance' for most relevant first, 'date' for newest first
